plan_binding_snapshot.title: CP00-209 RP06.P02.M07.S04-RP06.P02.M08.S18 generated_from_weighted_implementation_ledger
plan_binding_snapshot.renumbering_policy: Pack IDs are monotonic after the latest live closeout pack. If a requested locked queue skips live-open ledger units, live-open units are inserted first and requested packs are shifted with correction_reason.

implementation_summary.summary: CP00-209 implements descriptor-only DMS golden case and Hermes evidence cycle coverage over CP00-208: the Test And Golden Case Set tail (22 rows) and the Hermes Evidence Packet head (18 rows) as two cycles covering matter/permission/audit prechecks, primary and secondary paths, state transition enforcement, idempotency, lock, persistence, validation error mapping, review/approval routing, blocked-claim, rollback, retry, unit tests, integration smoke, golden fixture binding, Hermes service evidence, Claude service review prompt, service entrypoint contract, request normalization, tenant boundary precheck, Hermes evidence, Claude review packet, and CP00-210 handoff without opening DMS runtime dispatch, golden case or Hermes packet runtime, Hermes runtime receipts, rollback/retry runtime, unit-test runtime paths, review/approval route runtime, state writes, idempotency persistence, lock acquisition, workflow persistence, object storage, OCR, search, email, Citation Ledger, or Loop behavior.

parsed_review.summary: CP00-209 (Risk B, 40 units, RP06.P02.M07.S04-RP06.P02.M08.S18) is a descriptor-only DMS golden-case + Hermes-evidence cycle pack over CP00-208. Read-only inspection (Read/Grep/Glob) confirms the production_ready posture is supported and conservative: manifest production_ready=false, status implemented_pending_review, pack_level_claude_review status pending. All CP209 code (service.js:2224-2650 factories; registry.js bindings/requirements/no-write attestation; validators.js:2493-2708) returns frozen descriptor objects; a targeted scan found no fs/network/child_process/DB/clock/random/process.env usage — only intra-package imports and ': false' attestation flags. No-write and no-leak boundaries are not merely asserted but enforced by validateDmsCoreCp209GoldenCaseHermesCycleDescriptor, which checks ~40 boundary flags across both cycles, and are independently asserted in packages/dms/test/model.test.js (3 tests iterating all 22 golden + 18 Hermes guards) and scripts/validate-rp06-dms-core-contract.mjs. Coverage validation matches the live closeout-pack-plan.json CP00-209 entry exactly (40 units, 22/18 micro-title split, deliverable distribution summing to 40, matching ledger SHA). Authority boundary is intact: claude_is_final_approval=false, local_validation_claims_enterprise_trust=false, human_final_approval_required_for_runtime_opening=true, with the CP209 descriptor opening runtime at CP00-210 (contract line 18488; the CP00-209 runtime-opener at line 17432 belongs to the CP208 projection). Hermes patterns are used only for deterministic control-plane evidence (emits_hermes_runtime_receipt=false; descriptor strings + gate IDs), not product runtime. Review hardening is in place: forbidden_review_evidence covers auth_failure, stdout_0_bytes, malformed_json, fenced_json_plus_prose, tool_call_shaped_output, plus claude_final_approval/enterprise-trust/source-mutation claims; the review-schema enforces required fields with additionalProperties:false; readiness auth-preflight passed (exit 0, valid JSON). Post-review artifacts (claude-review-result.json, adjudication.md, construction-inspection.json) are correctly absent as they are produced after this gating review. No P0/P1/P2/P3 defects found. Verdict: PASS; does not block pack or goal closeout. Final-closeout validation commands and human final approval remain required outside this read-only review.

commit_policy.message: Close CP00-209 dms core golden case hermes cycle descriptor pack
